_provenance.source: Matriks MCP (interactive probe, sanctioned per CLAUDE.md §4)
_provenance.note: Takas (settlement custody) historical indicator — MKK-gated, now LIVE. Returns a clean DATED daily series {YYYYMMDD: {tQ: total custody quantity, tV: total custody value TRY}}. tQ is constant (= total float/custody quantity); tV moves with price. The plain call is the AGGREGATE (foreign+domestic) — isolating foreign custodians needs an agent-level takas filter (to confirm in the live session).

_golden_master.backs: (a) The MKK takas path is live (dated custody series). (b) A vivid anchor for the M2 regime break: the 19-Mar-2025 Imamoglu shock is VISIBLE in custody value — tV drops 341.7bn (03-18) -> 307.6bn (03-19) -> 287.7bn (03-20) -> 263.2bn (03-21), a ~23% custody-value contraction over three sessions. This is exactly the regime boundary the beta engine must break across (factors/regime.py imamoglu_shock_2025 = 2025-03-19).
_golden_master.stable_window: Fixed past window — value-anchored drift guard.
